# Daniela Alves Healing & Wellness

> Holistic therapy practice in Sintra, Portugal. 17 years of experience.
> 5.0 rating on Google (23 reviews).

## About

Daniela Alves is a holistic therapist with 17 years of experience, based in Sintra, Portugal. Her practice integrates multiple therapeutic modalities including massage, manual lymphatic drainage, aromatherapy, sound therapy, meditation, energy techniques and emotional release. Each session is guided by conscious touch and presence, supporting emotional integration and internal alignment.

## Services

### Healing Touch Session
- Price: 150 EUR
- Duration: ~2 hours
- Description: Personalized holistic therapeutic session. Although many come initially for therapeutic massage, the work goes far beyond physical relaxation. Based on an initial reading, the session is adjusted to each person's needs and moment. Techniques may include: massage, manual lymphatic drainage, aromatherapy, sound therapy, meditation, energy techniques or emotional release.

### Pure Radiance Immersion (Imersao Pura Radiancia)
- Price: 450 EUR
- Duration: ~4 hours
- Description: An individual mini-retreat, ideal for those who need a relaxing, transformative and intentional pause. A longer space to step out of the daily rhythm, disconnect and return to yourself. Held in an environment surrounded by nature and serenity. More than a session, it is a Ritual time — an invitation to reconnect with your Essence.

### Pure Earth Love (Personalized Aromatherapy)
- Price: 80 EUR (includes personalized product)
- Duration: ~30 minutes (in-person or online)
- Description: Personalized aromatherapy line with 100% natural essential oils. Through a brief session, we outline your needs and define a unique formula. Each product is prepared consciously and intentionally, as an extension of the therapeutic process.

### Home Harmony (Holistic Space Organization)
- Price: By consultation
- Duration: To be arranged (multiple visits)
- Description: Holistic organization service that supports the transformation of your space in a conscious, practical and aligned way. More than organizing, this work proposes an integrated approach between person and space — creating order, functionality, and a more harmonious relationship with the home. The process takes place over several visits, allowing for progressive, sustainable transformation with attention to natural and healthy materials and solutions.

## Location

R. do Regueiro do Tanque 3, Fontanelas
Sao Joao das Lampas, 2705-415 Sintra, Portugal
Coordinates: 38.8563, -9.4028
Free parking available.
